jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Rideshare Marketplace
jobs.content:
About the role

Lead matching-and-pricing service development for Lyft's rideshare marketplace handling tens of millions of trip-events per day.

  • Distributed-systems experience required

jobs.title: Senior Manager, Driver-Trust Policy
jobs.content: Own Lyft's driver-trust policy roadmap across community guidelines, fraud-vector response, and account-recovery flows.
